# fastai-pt-2

This file will become your README and also the index of your

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install fastai_pt_2 in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure fastai_pt_2 package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to fastai_pt_2
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Sina-Haz/fastai-pt-2):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/Sina-Haz/fastai-pt-2.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/Sina-Haz/fastai-pt-2)

``` sh
$ conda install -c Sina-Haz fastai_pt_2
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/fastai-pt-2/)

``` sh
$ pip install fastai_pt_2
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Sina-Haz/fastai-pt-2)’s
[pages](https://Sina-Haz.github.io/fastai-pt-2/). Additionally you can
find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/Sina-Haz/fastai-pt-2) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/fastai-pt-2/) respectively.
